T2sCloudServiceGoogle

T2sCloudServiceGoogle message contains settings for the Google Cloud service inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
voice_id string

Voice ID indicating the speaker

speaking_rate float

Speaking rate to control the speed of audio.

volume_gain_db float

Volume gain in db to control volume of the audio.

pitch float

pitch value of the audio

T2sCloudServiceMicrosoft

T2sCloudServiceMicrosoft message contains settings for the Microsoft Cloud service inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
voice_id string

Voice ID indicating the speaker.

use_default_speaker bool

Flag to indicate using the default speaker.

T2sPipelineId

Pipeline Id representation.

Used in the creation, deletion and getter of pipelines.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
id string

Required. Defines the id of the pipeline.

Text2Audio

Text2Audio message contains settings for text-to-audio inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
type string

The type of text-to-audio inference.

vits Vits

Vits inference settings.

vits_triton VitsTriton

Vits Triton inference settings.

t2s_cloud_service_elevenlabs T2sCloudServiceElevenLabs

ElevenLabs cloud service inference settings.

t2s_cloud_service_amazon T2sCloudServiceAmazon

Amazon cloud service inference settings.

t2s_cloud_service_google T2sCloudServiceGoogle

Google cloud service inference settings.

t2s_cloud_service_microsoft T2sCloudServiceMicrosoft

Microsoft cloud service inference settings.

qwen3_tts_custom_voice Qwen3TtsCustomVoice

Qwen3-TTS-custom-voice inference settings.

qwen3_tts_base Qwen3TtsBase

Qwen3-TTS-base inference settings for voice cloning.

Text2Mel

Text2Mel message contains settings for text-to-mel inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
type string

The type of text-to-mel inference.

glow_tts GlowTTS

GlowTTS inference settings.

glow_tts_triton GlowTTSTriton

GlowTTS Triton inference settings.

Text2SpeechConfig

Configuration of text-to-speech models representation.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
id string

Required. Defines the id of the pipeline.

description T2SDescription

Required. Defines the description of the pipeline representation.

active bool

Required. Defines if the pipeline is active or inactive.

inference T2SInference

Required. Defines he inference of the pipeline representation.

normalization T2SNormalization

Required. Defines the normalization process of the pipeline representation.

postprocessing Postprocessing

Required. Defines the postprocessing process of the pipeline representation.

UpdateCustomPhonemizerRequest

UpdateCustomPhonemizerRequest message represents the request for updating a custom phonemizer.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
id string

The ID of the custom phonemizer to be updated.

update_method UpdateCustomPhonemizerRequest.UpdateMethod

The update method.

maps Map repeated

Repeated field of Map messages representing word-to-phoneme mappings.

Vits

Vits message contains settings for the Vits inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
batch_size int64

The batch size for inference.

use_gpu bool

Flag indicating whether to use GPU for inference.

length_scale float

The length scale for inference.

noise_scale float

The noise scale for inference.

path string

The path to the Vits model.

cleaners string repeated

Repeated field containing the cleaners for text normalization.

param_config_path string

The path to the parameter configuration.

VitsTriton

VitsTriton message contains settings for the Vits Triton inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
batch_size int64

The batch size for inference.

length_scale float

The length scale for inference.

noise_scale float

The noise scale for inference.

cleaners string repeated

Repeated field containing the cleaners for text normalization.

max_text_length int64

The maximum text length allowed.

param_config_path string

The path to the parameter configuration.

triton_model_name string

The name of the Triton model.

triton_server_host string

The host of the Triton inference server which servers the model.

triton_server_port int64

The port of the Triton inference server which servers the model.

VoiceSettings

VoiceSettings message contains settings for ElevenLabs inference.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
stability float

stability value for elevenlabs inference

similarity_boost float

similarity boost value for ElevenLabs inference.

style float

style boost value for ElevenLabs inference.

use_speaker_boost bool

Flag to indicate speaker boost

Wiener

Wiener message contains settings for Wiener postprocessing.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
frame_len int64

The frame length.

lpc_order int64

The LPC order.

iterations int64

The number of iterations.

alpha float

The alpha value.

thresh float

The threshold value.

Enums

AudioFormat

AudioFormat enum represents various audio file formats for storing digital audio data.

NameNumberDescription
wav 0

Waveform Audio File Format (WAV)
flac 1

Free Lossless Audio Codec (FLAC)
caf 2

Core Audio Format (CAF)
mp3 3

MPEG Audio Layer III (MP3)
aac 4

Advanced Audio Coding (AAC)
ogg 5

Ogg Vorbis (OGG)
wma 6

Windows Media Audio (WMA)

Pcm

Represents a pulse-code modulation technique.

NameNumberDescription
PCM_16 0

16-bit pulse-code modulation.
PCM_24 1

24-bit pulse-code modulation.
PCM_32 2

32-bit pulse-code modulation.
PCM_S8 3

Signed 8-bit pulse-code modulation.
PCM_U8 4

Unsigned 8-bit pulse-code modulation.
FLOAT 5

Floating-point (32-bit) pulse-code modulation.
DOUBLE 6

Floating-point (64-bit) pulse-code modulation.

UpdateCustomPhonemizerRequest.UpdateMethod

The update method to be used.

UpdateMethod enum defines the method for updating custom phonemizers.

NameNumberDescription
extend_hard 0

Add new words, replacing existing ones.
extend_soft 1

Add new words if they are not already present.
replace 2

Replace all words in the phonemizer with new ones.

ondewo/vtsi/calls.proto

Top

Services

Calls

ONDEWO VTSI API

Service Methods

StartCaller

rpc StartCaller (StartCallerRequest) returns (StartCallerResponse)

Start single caller instance for a specific nlu-project.

StartCallers

rpc StartCallers (StartCallersRequest) returns (StartCallersResponse)

Start multiple ondewo-sip callers instances for a specific nlu-project.

ListCallers

rpc ListCallers (ListCallersRequest) returns (ListCallersResponse)

Lists all available callers

GetCaller

rpc GetCaller (GetCallerRequest) returns (Caller)

Gets a caller

DeleteCaller

rpc DeleteCaller (DeleteCallerRequest) returns (DeleteCallerResponse)

Deletes a caller

DeleteCallers

rpc DeleteCallers (DeleteCallersRequest) returns (DeleteCallersResponse)

Deletes multiple callers

StopCaller

rpc StopCaller (StopCallerRequest) returns (StopCallerResponse)

Stops a caller

StopCallers

rpc StopCallers (StopCallersRequest) returns (StopCallersResponse)

Stops multiple callers

StartListener

rpc StartListener (StartListenerRequest) returns (StartListenerResponse)

Start single listener instance for a specific nlu-project.

StartListeners

rpc StartListeners (StartListenersRequest) returns (StartListenersResponse)

Start multiple ondewo-sip listeners instances for a specific nlu-project.

StopListener

rpc StopListener (StopListenerRequest) returns (StopListenerResponse)

Stop a ondewo-sip listeners instances for a specific nlu-project.

StopListeners

rpc StopListeners (StopListenersRequest) returns (StopListenersResponse)

Stop multiple ondewo-sip listeners instances for a specific nlu-project.

ListListeners

rpc ListListeners (ListListenersRequest) returns (ListListenersResponse)

Lists all available listeners

GetListener

rpc GetListener (GetListenerRequest) returns (Listener)

Gets a listener

DeleteListener

rpc DeleteListener (DeleteListenerRequest) returns (DeleteListenerResponse)

Deletes a listener

DeleteListeners

rpc DeleteListeners (DeleteListenersRequest) returns (DeleteListenersResponse)

Deletes multiple listeners

StartScheduledCaller

rpc StartScheduledCaller (StartScheduledCallerRequest) returns (StartScheduledCallerResponse)

Start multiple ondewo-sip callers instances with schedules

StartScheduledCallers

rpc StartScheduledCallers (StartScheduledCallersRequest) returns (StartScheduledCallersResponse)

Start multiple ondewo-sip callers instances with schedules

StopCall

rpc StopCall (StopCallRequest) returns (StopCallResponse)

Stop/kill a ondewo-sip listener or caller instance for a specific vtsi-project.

StopCalls

rpc StopCalls (StopCallsRequest) returns (StopCallsResponse)

Stop/kill a list of ondewo-sip listener or caller instances for a specific vtsi-project.

Stops both Listener and Caller calls

StopAllCalls

rpc StopAllCalls (StopAllCallsRequest) returns (StopCallsResponse)

Stop/kill all ondewo-sip listener or caller instance for a specific nlu-project.

Stops all Listener and Caller calls

TransferCall

rpc TransferCall (TransferCallRequest) returns (TransferCallResponse)

Transfer a call from a listener to another

TransferCalls

rpc TransferCalls (TransferCallsRequest) returns (TransferCallsResponse)

Transfer a call from a listener to another

GetCall

rpc GetCall (GetCallRequest) returns (Call)

Get call log for single call instance

ListCalls

rpc ListCalls (ListCallsRequest) returns (ListCallsResponse)

Get call log for all call instances

Messages

AllServicesStatuses

Status of ondewo-sip instance

FieldTypeLabelDescription
status_sip ServiceStatus

health status for sip

status_asterisk ServiceStatus

status of the associated asterisk server

status_nlu ServiceStatus

status of the nlu instance associated with the call

status_stt ServiceStatus

status of the associated speech-to-text service

status_tts ServiceStatus

status of the associated text-to-speech service

AsteriskConfig

Asterisk configuration

FieldTypeLabelDescription
asterisk_base_config BaseServiceConfig

Host, Port, and [Optional] GRPC cert

AudioObjectStorageConfig

Minio Audio Object Store

FieldTypeLabelDescription
activate_audio_object_storage bool

Audio storage should be activated or not

audio_object_storage_services_activation_config AudioObjectStorageServicesActivationConfig

Configuration of the Minio Audio Object Store

AudioObjectStorageServicesActivationConfig

Configuration of the Minio Audio Object Store

FieldTypeLabelDescription
activate_s2t bool

Should audio object store save audio sent to the Speech-2-Text platform

activate_t2s bool

Should audio object store save audio generated from the Text-2-Speech platform

BaseServiceConfig

Base configuration of services (ondewo-nlu, text-to-speech, speech-to-text, asterisk)

FieldTypeLabelDescription
host string

service host IP

port int32

service port

grpc_cert string

Optional: GRPC cert for the given service

Call

Call

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

call name For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
sip_account string

sip account used

container_name string

container name which you get from docker ps

call_type CallType

Listener or caller enum .. if not specified

phone_number string

callee voip id or callee phone number

start_time google.protobuf.Timestamp

start time of log

end_time google.protobuf.Timestamp

end time of log

sip_status_type ondewo.sip.SipStatus.StatusType

current sip status type

sip_status ondewo.sip.SipStatus optional

current sip status

sip_status_history ondewo.sip.SipStatusHistoryResponse optional

sip status history

services_statuses AllServicesStatuses optional

All container health statuses

active bool

Is a call active or not

vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
common_services_config CommonServicesConfig optional

Detailed configuration of the services used for the call such as S2T, T2S, NLU, SIP and CSI

sip_port int32 optional

SIP port of the call

csi_port int32 optional

CSI port of the call

nlu_session_name string optional

NLU session name

platforms ondewo.nlu.Intent.Message.Platform optional

Messages for each of the Intent.Message.Platform were sent to the user

CallFilter

Definition of a CallFilter, representing filters for querying calls.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
call_names string repeated

Optional: Filter by call names.

nlu_session_names string repeated

Optional: Filter by NLU session names.

sip_accounts string repeated

Optional: Filter by SIP accounts.

phone_numbers string repeated

Optional: Filter by phone numbers.

container_names string repeated

Optional: Filter by container names.

sip_ports string repeated

Optional: Filter by SIP ports.

csi_ports string repeated

Optional: Filter by CSI ports.

call_types CallType repeated

Optional: Filter by call types (both by default, or only listeners, or only callers).

sip_status_types ondewo.sip.SipStatus.StatusType repeated

Optional: Filter based on SIP status types.

call_status CallStatus optional

Optional: Filter based on active or inactive calls.

start_time google.protobuf.Timestamp optional

Optional: Start time of the log.

end_time google.protobuf.Timestamp optional

Optional: End time of the log.

duration_in_s_min float optional

Optional: Match only sessions for which the duration in seconds is larger or equal.

duration_in_s_max float optional

Optional: Match only calls for which the duration in seconds is smaller or equal.

platforms ondewo.nlu.Intent.Message.Platform repeated

Optional: Platform responses sent to the user. Default is text: Platform.PLATFORM_UNSPECIFIED

Caller

Caller represents a caller instance that initiates outbound calls

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

Caller name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>
call_name string

The call name that was assigned to the call 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
sip_caller_config SipCallerConfig

SIP service configuration

common_services_config CommonServicesConfig

Service Configs of Speech-2-Text, NLU, Text-2-Speech and CSI

CommonServicesConfig

Service Configs of Speech-2-Text, NLU, Text-2-Speech and CSI which are common for both listener and caller

FieldTypeLabelDescription
s2t_vtsi_config S2tVtsiConfig

speech-to-text service configuration

nlu_vtsi_config NluVtsiConfig

ondewo-nlu configuration

t2s_vtsi_config T2sVtsiConfig

text-to-speech service configuration

csi_vtsi_config CsiVtsiConfig

CSI service configuration

Credentials

Credentials

FieldTypeLabelDescription
account_name string

Account name - usually email address

password string

password of the account

CsiVtsiConfig

CSI configuration

FieldTypeLabelDescription
s2t_vtsi_callbacks S2tVtsiCallbacks

Callback for the Speech-2-Text platform

nlu_vtsi_callbacks NluVtsiCallbacks

Callback for the NLU platform

t2s_vtsi_callbacks T2sVtsiCallbacks

Callback for the Text-2-Speech platform

audio_object_store_config AudioObjectStorageConfig

Configuration of the Minio Audio Object Store

message_broker_config MessageBrokerConfig

Configuration of the RabbitMQ Message Broker

activate_control_messages bool

Setting to activate if it is possible to send control messages

  • via RabbitMQ to remote control the system
  • via embeddings in NLU text responses

DeleteCallerRequest

Represents a request to delete a specific caller.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the caller to delete in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>

DeleteCallerResponse

Represents a request to delete a specific caller.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the deleted caller in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>
error_message string

error message if there are any.

DeleteCallersRequest

Represents a request to delete multiple callers.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
names string repeated

The name of the caller to delete in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>

DeleteCallersResponse

Response to delete multiple callers

FieldTypeLabelDescription
delete_caller_responses DeleteCallerResponse repeated

responses to delete callers

error_message string

error message if there are any.

DeleteListenerRequest

Represents a request to delete a specific listener.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the listener to delete in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>

DeleteListenerResponse

Represents a request to delete a specific listener.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the deleted listener in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>
error_message string

error message if there are any.

DeleteListenersRequest

Represents a request to delete multiple listeners.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
names string repeated

The names of the listeners to delete in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>

DeleteListenersResponse

Response to delete multiple listeners

FieldTypeLabelDescription
delete_listener_responses DeleteListenerResponse repeated

responses to delete listeners

error_message string

error message if there are any.

GetCallRequest

Request to get a call instance's call logs

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_name string

call name For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full .. see above for more info

GetCallerRequest

Represents a request to get a specific caller.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
name string

The name of caller to retrieve.

call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full

GetListenerRequest

Represents a request to get a specific listener.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
name string

The name of listener to retrieve.

call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full

ListCallersRequest

Represents a request to list callers.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name for which to perform the call. The format is: 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
page_token string optional

Optional. The next_page_token value returned from a previous list request. Example: "current_index-1--page_size-20"

call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full

ListCallersResponse

Represents the response for listing callers.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
callers Caller repeated

The list of callers.

ListCallsRequest

Request to list calls

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full .. see above for more info

call_filter CallFilter optional

Optional. A filter to narrow the response down to sessions of interest.

page_token string optional

Optional. The next_page_token value returned from a previous list request. Example: "current_index-1--page_size-20"

ListCallsResponse

Response to list all VoipInfos

FieldTypeLabelDescription
calls Call repeated

The list of calls returned in the response

next_page_token string

Token to retrieve the next page of results. This field is a string that holds a token for fetching the next page of results. If there are no more results in the list, this field will be empty.

ListListenersRequest

Represents a request to list listeners.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name for which to perform the call. The format is: 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
page_token string optional

Optional. The next_page_token value returned from a previous list request. Example: "current_index-1--page_size-20"

call_view CallView optional

you can specify the view to be shallow or full

ListListenersResponse

Represents the response for listing listeners.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
listeners Listener repeated

The list of listeners.

next_page_token string

Token to retrieve the next page of results. This field is a string that holds a token for fetching the next page of results. If there are no more results in the list, this field will be empty.

Listener

Listener represents a listener instance that waits for incoming calls

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>
call_name string

The call name that was assigned to the call 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
sip_base_config SipBaseConfig

SIP service configuration

common_services_config CommonServicesConfig

Service Configs of Speech-2-Text, NLU, Text-2-Speech and CSI

MessageBrokerConfig

Configuration of the RabbitMQ Message Broker

FieldTypeLabelDescription
activate_message_broker bool

Should the broker be activated or not

message_broker_services_activation_config MessageBrokerServicesActivationConfig

Configuration of the Broker service activation

rabbit_mq_config RabbitMqConfig

Configuration of the RabbitMQ Message Broker

MessageBrokerServicesActivationConfig

Configuration of the RabbitMQ Message Broker

FieldTypeLabelDescription
activate_s2t bool

should RabbitMQ Message Broker be activated for Speech-2-Text platform

activate_nlu bool

should RabbitMQ Message Broker be activated for NLU platform

activate_t2s bool

should RabbitMQ Message Broker be activated for Text-2-Speech platform

activate_sip bool

should RabbitMQ Message Broker be activated for SIP platform

NluVtsiCallbacks

Callback for the NLU platform

FieldTypeLabelDescription
pre_nlu_callbacks string repeated

Callback executed before the NLU will be called

post_nlu_callbacks string repeated

Callback executed after the NLU has been called

NluVtsiConfig

NLU Configuration

FieldTypeLabelDescription
nlu_base_config BaseServiceConfig

Base config Host, Port, and [Optional] GRPC cert

credentials Credentials

Credentials with classical username and password

auth_token string

Authentication token

agent_name string

The resource name of the agent. Format: 

projects/<uuid>/agent
language_code string

language code in a two letter iso code, e.g. de, en, etc.

initial_intent string

name of intent to trigger at the start of a call

contexts ondewo.nlu.Context repeated

ondewo-nlu list of contexts

http_basic_auth_token string

http basic auth token

platform ondewo.nlu.Intent.Message.Platform optional

Return the message specified in Intent.Message.Platform platform to the user in the DetectIntentResponse

RabbitMqConfig

Configuration of the RabbitMQ Message Broker

FieldTypeLabelDescription
host string

host where the rabbit mq server runs

port int32

port where the rabbit mq server runs

port_2 int32

secondary port where the rabbit mq server runs

user string

user of server

password string

password of server

S2tVtsiCallbacks

Callback for the Speech-2-Text platform

FieldTypeLabelDescription
pre_s2t_callbacks string repeated

Callback executed before the Speech-2-Text will be called

post_s2t_callbacks string repeated

Callback executed after the Speech-2-Text has been called

S2tVtsiConfig

Speech-2-Text Configuration

FieldTypeLabelDescription
s2t_base_config BaseServiceConfig

Host, Port, and [Optional] GRPC cert

s2t_transcribe_request_config ondewo.s2t.TranscribeRequestConfig

Configuration of Speech-2-Text

ScheduledCaller

ScheduledCaller message - a Caller with a schedule when to start calling

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

Resource name of the scheduled caller 

projects/<project_uuid>/scheduled_callers/<scheduled_caller_uuid>
call_name string

The asterisk sip call name that was assigned to the call For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
sip_config SipBaseConfig

SIP service configuration

common_services_config CommonServicesConfig

Service Configs of Speech-2-Text, NLU, Text-2-Speech and CSI

scheduled_time google.protobuf.Timestamp

Time the call is scheduled TODO to be refactored with a more complex scheduling object

ServiceStatus

Status of service

FieldTypeLabelDescription
healthy bool

health status

error_message string

error messages if you have any so if it's unhealthy

SipBaseConfig

The base config is for both the listener and caller. If you only provide it you will get a listener

You will need to provide SipCallerConfig for the caller

FieldTypeLabelDescription
sip_sim_version string

version of sip to use for call, semantic versioning e.g., 1.0.0, 1.1.0-pre-release, etc.

SipCallerConfig

Configuration of the SIP caller

FieldTypeLabelDescription
sip_base_config SipBaseConfig

SIP configuration

callee_id string

callee id e.g. phone number to call, +4365012345678 or VOIP phone ondewo0001@ondewo.com, etc.

sip_headers SipCallerConfig.SipHeadersEntry repeated

dictionary of sip headers that are sent on call

SipCallerConfig.SipHeadersEntry

FieldTypeLabelDescription
key string

value string

StartCallerRequest

Request for starting a caller

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
sip_caller_config SipCallerConfig

SIP service configuration

common_services_config CommonServicesConfig

Service Configs of Speech-2-Text, NLU, Text-2-Speech and CSI

StartCallerResponse

Response to start multiple listeners

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
caller Caller

The caller that was started

error_message string

error message if you have any so if it's unhealthy

StartCallersRequest

Request to start multiple callers

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
caller_requests StartCallerRequest repeated

Callers that should be started

StartCallersResponse

Response to the start caller request

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
caller_responses StartCallerResponse repeated

The call ids that were assigned to each listener

error_message string

overall error message if you have any so if it's unhealthy

StopAllCallsRequest

Request to stop all calls of a VTSI project, so all listeners and callers

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project

StopCallRequest

Request to stop/kill a ondewo-sip listener or caller instance for a specific vtsi-project.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project parent with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_name string

call name to stop For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>

StopCallResponse

Response to stop/kill a ondewo-sip listener or caller instance for a specific vtsi-project.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to stop the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_name string

call name to stop For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
error_message string

error messages if you have any so if it's unhealthy

StopCallerRequest

Represents a request to stop a specific caller.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the caller to stop in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>

Represents a request to stop a specific caller.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

The name of the stop caller in the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>
error_message string

error message if there are any.

Callback for the Text-2-Speech platform

FieldTypeLabelDescription

Callback executed before the Text-2-Speech will be called

post_t2s_callbacks string repeated

Callback executed after the Text-2-Speech has been called

TransferCallRequest

Request to transfer calls

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_name string

call name to transfer For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
transfer_id string

transfer_id to transfer the call to, so the number or voip number you want to be transferred too

TransferCallResponse

Response to transfer a call to a phone number or voip number

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
call_name string

call name to transfer For listener this is 

projects/<project_uuid>/listeners/<listener_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
For callers this is 
projects/<project_uuid>/callers/<caller_uuid>/calls/<call_uuid>
transfer_id string

transfer id to transfer the calls to, so the phone number or voip number you want to be transferred too

error_message string

error message if you have any so if it's unhealthy

TransferCallsRequest

Request to transfer multiple calls

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
transfer_call_requests TransferCallRequest repeated

Responses to transfer multiple calls to a phone number or voip number

TransferCallsResponse

Response to transfer a call to a phone number or voip number

FieldTypeLabelDescription

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
transfer_call_responses TransferCallResponse repeated

Enums

CallStatus

Call view options

NameNumberDescription
CALL_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED 0

Unspecified call status
CALL_STATUS_ACTIVE 1

Call is active
CALL_STATUS_INACTIVE 2

Call is inactive

CallType

CallType

NameNumberDescription
BOTH 0

Both listener and caller
LISTENER 1

Listener
CALLER 2

Caller
SCHEDULED_CALLER 3

Scheduled Caller

CallView

Call view options

NameNumberDescription
MINIMUM 0

Gives only minimum info about the call
SHALLOW 1

Gives further basic info like call name, start_time, end_time, current sip status
FULL 2

Gives you the full info with status history and the services statuses

ondewo/vtsi/projects.proto

Top

Services

Projects

ONDEWO VTSI API

Service Methods

CreateVtsiProject

rpc CreateVtsiProject (CreateVtsiProjectRequest) returns (CreateVtsiProjectResponse)

Create a VTSI project with configs

GetVtsiProject

rpc GetVtsiProject (GetVtsiProjectRequest) returns (VtsiProject)

Get a VTSI project with configs

UpdateVtsiProject

rpc UpdateVtsiProject (UpdateVtsiProjectRequest) returns (UpdateVtsiProjectResponse)

Update a VTSI project with configs

DeleteVtsiProject

rpc DeleteVtsiProject (DeleteVtsiProjectRequest) returns (DeleteVtsiProjectResponse)

Delete a VTSI project with configs

DeployVtsiProject

rpc DeployVtsiProject (DeployVtsiProjectRequest) returns (DeployVtsiProjectResponse)

Deploy a VTSI project

UndeployVtsiProject

rpc UndeployVtsiProject (UndeployVtsiProjectRequest) returns (UndeployVtsiProjectResponse)

Undeploy a VTSI project

ListVtsiProjects

rpc ListVtsiProjects (ListVtsiProjectsRequest) returns (ListVtsiProjectsResponse)

Get a VTSI project with configs

Messages

AsteriskConfigs

Configurations object for the Asterisk server

FieldTypeLabelDescription
asterisk_configs_variables AsteriskConfigsVariables

Configs as variables which will fill those variables using a blue print.

asterisk_configs_files AsteriskConfigsFiles

Configs as files which will set up the configs using those files.

asterisk_configs_target_directory_name string

Configs will be mapped in from a preconfigured asterisk target directory.

asterisk_port int32

OPTIONAL: The port where Asterisk should start.

AsteriskConfigsFiles

Configuration files for the Asterisk server

FieldTypeLabelDescription
sip_conf_file_string string

sip.conf file as string

extensions_conf_file_string string

extensions.conf file as string

queues_conf_file_string string

queues.conf file as string

modules_conf_file_string string

modules.conf file as string

AsteriskConfigsVariables

Configuration variables for the Asterisk server

FieldTypeLabelDescription
sip_trunk_username string

SIP trunk username.

sip_trunk_password string

SIP trunk password.

sip_trunk_host string

SIP trunk host.

transfer_number string

Transfer number.

transfer_number_host string

Transfer number host.

sip_trunk_phone_number string

SIP trunk phone number / caller id.

CreateVtsiProjectRequest

Request for creating a VTSI project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project VtsiProject

VTSI project Recommended is to leave "name" empty. The project name here is optional. If no name is given a new parent name is created. The parent has the format: 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
error_message string

error message if there are any.

CreateVtsiProjectResponse

Response of the create project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project VtsiProject

Vtsi project

error_message string

error message if there are any.

DeleteVtsiProjectRequest

Request to delete a VTSI project

If a deployed VTSI project was deleted then it was undeployed beforehand automatically

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project

DeleteVtsiProjectResponse

Response to delete a VTSI project

If a deployed VTSI project was deleted then it was undeployed beforehand automatically

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
error_message string

error message if there are any.

DeployVtsiProjectRequest

Request to deploy a vtsi project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project

DeployVtsiProjectResponse

Response to deploy a vtsi project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
error_message string

error message if there are any.

GetVtsiProjectRequest

Request to retrieve a VTSI project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
vtsi_project_view VtsiProjectView

Optional. Specify the view of the returned VtsiProject (full view by default)

ListVtsiProjectsRequest

Request to get the list of agents

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project_view VtsiProjectView

Optional. Specify the view of the returned VtsiProject (full view by default)

page_token string optional

Optional. The next_page_token value returned from a previous list request. Example: "current_index-1--page_size-20"

vtsi_project_sorting VtsiProjectSorting optional

Optional. Field to define the sorting of the list of VTSI projects in the response. If not specified, the default behavior is to have no sorting.

nlu_agent_names string repeated

Optional. Filter based on associated NLU agents. Format: 

projects/<Project ID>/agent

ListVtsiProjectsResponse

This is a protobuf message definition for the response of getting a list of VTSI projects.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_projects VtsiProject repeated

The list of VTSI projects returned in the response. Use the 'repeated' keyword to indicate that this field can contain multiple instances of VtsiProject.

next_page_token string

Token to retrieve the next page of results. This field is a string that holds a token for fetching the next page of results. If there are no more results in the list, this field will be empty.

UndeployVtsiProjectRequest

Request to undeploy a vtsi project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

Project name of the VTSI project.

UndeployVtsiProjectResponse

Response to undeploy a vtsi project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
error_message string

error message if there are any.

UpdateVtsiProjectRequest

Request to updated VTSI project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
vtsi_project VtsiProject

Project Configs.

UpdateVtsiProjectResponse

Request to updated VTSI project

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

VTSI project name with which to perform the call of the form 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
error_message string

error message if there are any.

VtsiProject

The VTSI project with its configuration setting

FieldTypeLabelDescription
name string

Required. The project name. Format: 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
Only when a new VtsiProject is created the name can be undefined/empty

display_name string

OPTIONAL: The display name of the project

max_callers int32

The maximum number of callers that this project can have.

max_listeners int32

The maximum number of listeners that this project can have.

asterisk_configs AsteriskConfigs

Configs to start the asterisk server.

vtsi_project_status VtsiProjectStatus

The status of the VTSI project.

created_by string

The user who created the vtsi project. Readonly.

created_at google.protobuf.Timestamp

Creation time of the vtsi project. Readonly.

modified_by string

The user who modified the vtsi project. Readonly.

modified_at google.protobuf.Timestamp

Modification time of the vtsi project. Readonly.

active_callers int32

The number of active callers in this project.

active_listeners int32

The number of active listeners in this project.

asterisk_port int32

The port of the asterisk server

nlu_agent_names string repeated

Associated NLU agents. Format: 

projects/<Project ID>/agent
deployed_callers int32

The number of deployed callers in this project.

deployed_listeners int32

The number of deployed listeners in this project.

VtsiProjectSorting

This protobuf message defines the sorting order for VTSI (Virtual Test System Infrastructure) projects.

FieldTypeLabelDescription
sorting_field VtsiProjectSorting.VtsiProjectSortingField optional

sorting field for vtsi projects sorting

sorting_mode VtsiProjectSortingMode optional

Sorting mode

Enums

VtsiProjectSorting.VtsiProjectSortingField

Enum to specify the sorting field for VTSI projects.

Enum defining the field by which VTSI projects can be sorted

NameNumberDescription
NO_VTSI_PROJECT_SORTING 0

No sorting
SORT_VTSI_PROJECT_BY_NAME 1

Sort by project name such as 

projects/<project_uuid>/project
.
SORT_VTSI_PROJECT_BY_DISPLAY_NAME 2

Sort by display name
SORT_VTSI_PROJECT_BY_CREATION_DATE 3

Sort by creation date
SORT_VTSI_PROJECT_BY_LAST_MODIFIED 4

Sort by last modified date

VtsiProjectSortingMode

Sorting mode

NameNumberDescription
ASCENDING 0

The ascending sorting mode. When sorting using this mode, VtsiProject objects will be arranged in ascending order based on the specified criteria.
DESCENDING 1

The descending sorting mode. When sorting using this mode, VtsiProject objects will be arranged in descending order based on the specified criteria.

VtsiProjectStatus

Status of a VtsiProject.

NameNumberDescription
UNSPECIFIED 0

No status specified
UNDEPLOYED 1

Project successfully created and undeployed
UPDATING 2

Project configuration is updating
DEPLOYING 3

Project is deploying
DEPLOYED 4

Project is deployed
UNDEPLOYING 5

Project is un-deploying
DELETING 6

Project is currently deleting
DELETED 7

Project is deleted

VtsiProjectView

Structure of VTSI_PROJECT view

  • CreateVTSI_PROJECT: VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_SHALLOW

  • UpdateVTSI_PROJECT: VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_SHALLOW

  • GetVTSI_PROJECT: VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_FULL

  • ListVTSI_PROJECTs: VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_SHALLOW

NameNumberDescription
VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_UNSPECIFIED 0

Unspecified VTSI_PROJECT view: the view is defined by the call:
VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_FULL 1

Full VTSI_PROJECT view: populate all the fields of the VTSI_PROJECT message including configs.
VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_SHALLOW 2

Shallow VTSI_PROJECT view: populates all the fields except configs.
VTSI_PROJECT_VIEW_MINIMUM 3

Minimum view including only VTSI_PROJECT UUID and VTSI_PROJECT display name

Scalar Value Types

.proto TypeNotesC++JavaPythonGoC#PHPRuby
double double double float float64 double float Float
float float float float float32 float float Float
int32 Uses variable-length encoding. Inefficient for encoding negative numbers – if your field is likely to have negative values, use sint32 instead. int32 int int int32 int integer Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
int64 Uses variable-length encoding. Inefficient for encoding negative numbers – if your field is likely to have negative values, use sint64 instead. int64 long int/long int64 long integer/string Bignum
uint32 Uses variable-length encoding. uint32 int int/long uint32 uint integer Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
uint64 Uses variable-length encoding. uint64 long int/long uint64 ulong integer/string Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
sint32 Uses variable-length encoding. Signed int value. These more efficiently encode negative numbers than regular int32s. int32 int int int32 int integer Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
sint64 Uses variable-length encoding. Signed int value. These more efficiently encode negative numbers than regular int64s. int64 long int/long int64 long integer/string Bignum
fixed32 Always four bytes. More efficient than uint32 if values are often greater than 2^28. uint32 int int uint32 uint integer Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
fixed64 Always eight bytes. More efficient than uint64 if values are often greater than 2^56. uint64 long int/long uint64 ulong integer/string Bignum
sfixed32 Always four bytes. int32 int int int32 int integer Bignum or Fixnum (as required)
sfixed64 Always eight bytes. int64 long int/long int64 long integer/string Bignum
bool bool boolean boolean bool bool boolean TrueClass/FalseClass
string A string must always contain UTF-8 encoded or 7-bit ASCII text. string String str/unicode string string string String (UTF-8)
bytes May contain any arbitrary sequence of bytes. string ByteString str []byte ByteString string String (ASCII-8BIT)
